partnerships.meta.title: Partnerships
partnerships.meta.description: Partner with Simple Deutsch to support integration through language learning and practical digital education.
partnerships.hero.title: Partnerships
partnerships.hero.intro: Simple Deutsch partners with companies, universities, and non-profits to support integration through language learning and practical digital education.
partnerships.partners.heading: Partners of Simple Deutsch
partnerships.sections.preLogos.p1: We build partnerships with organizations that share our goal: helping newcomers navigate life in Germany through clear language and practical digital learning.
partnerships.sections.preLogos.p2: Typical collaborations include sponsored learning cohorts, co-created content, and local outreach programs.
partnerships.sections.preLogos.p3: Whether you are a company, foundation, or public institution, we can shape a pilot format that fits your audience and goals.
partnerships.sections.postLogos.p1: Every partnership starts with a focused objective and a clear impact path.
partnerships.sections.postLogos.p2: We define a lightweight rollout plan with clear responsibilities and milestones.
partnerships.sections.postLogos.p3: Learning formats are adaptable and can be embedded into existing initiatives.
partnerships.sections.postLogos.p4: Partners receive regular progress updates and practical recommendations.
partnerships.sections.postLogos.p5: If you are exploring a collaboration, we can begin with a short discovery call.
partnerships.cta.title: Let's collaborate
partnerships.cta.lead: Tell us what kind of partnership you have in mind and we will suggest a simple pilot with next steps.
